task_objective: Fashion Image to Standardized Line Art & 9-View 3x3 - Convert Figure 1 to standardized garment line art, then map Figure 2 aesthetics onto it, garment structure FULLY PRESERVED

input_assets.source_image: Figure 1 - Any garment image (photo/sketch/render) - Extract ONLY garment, exclude background/figure
input_assets.aesthetic_reference: Figure 2 Inspiration Image - Colors, pattern, texture, fabric style - applied to garment only

workflow.step_1: Extract ONLY garment from Figure 1 (exclude background, model, and other elements), then convert to standardized garment line art: clean up details, standardize proportions
workflow.step_2: Parse standardized line art structure + extract Figure 2 aesthetic DNA
workflow.step_3: View_1 (FIXED): 1:1 replica of Figure 2 aesthetics. Views 2-9 (DESIGNER): same DNA reinterpreted through 8 distinct international designer aesthetics
workflow.step_4: Verify garment structure unchanged across all views, assemble 9-view 3x3 grid

outputs.view_1: Precise Replica - 1:1 replica of Figure 2 aesthetics on standardized garment, SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.view_2: Alexander McQueen - Dramatic avant-garde, dark romanticism, sculptural silhouettes, intricate textile manipulation
outputs.view_3: Coco Chanel - Timeless elegance, tweed texture, black-and-white contrast, refined minimalism
outputs.view_4: Rei Kawakubo - Deconstructed forms, asymmetry, raw edges, anti-fashion provocation
outputs.view_5: Valentino - Romantic femininity, ethereal fabrics, delicate lace, poetic color palette
outputs.view_6: Yohji Yamamoto - Monochrome draping, fluid volumes, wabi-sabi aesthetic, architectural wraps
outputs.view_7: Dolce & Gabbana - Opulent baroque, rich brocade, Mediterranean vibrance, ornate embellishment
outputs.view_8: Phoebe Philo - Intelligent minimalism, clean cuts, neutral palette, effortless modernity
outputs.view_9: John Galliano - Theatrical excess, historical fusion, exaggerated proportions, couture spectacle

output_requirements: GARMENT EXTRACTION: Extract ONLY garment from Figure 1, completely exclude background, human figure, and other non-garment elements
LINE ART CONVERSION: Convert extracted garment to clean, standardized line art before aesthetic application
GARMENT LOCK: Standardized garment structure identical across all 9 views — zero structural deviation
Model: Asian/Caucasian/African, auto-adapted, consistent across all views,A relaxed and sophisticated cross-legged standing pose with a sense of dynamic elegance
SFW; realistic fabric draping; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
No text/labels/watermarks; Premium 3x3, cinematic grading, luxury white space, magazine editorial standard
